company_context: Causal is now part of Lucanet Causal is now part of Lucanet Causal has joined Lucanet to deliver Extended Planning and Analysis (xP&A) as part of the Lucanet CFO Solution Platform. Make smarter planning decisions with unified real-time insights across financial and operational planning. Redirecting in 20 Learn about xP&A or Existing Causal customer? Log in to your account →

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours make better decisions with their data. I saw that you're the CTO at Lucanet, and I was wondering if you'd be open to discussing how we can help you optimize your planning and analysis processes.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes. We've recently joined forces with Causal to deliver Extended Planning and Analysis, so we're pretty set on the planning side. What makes you think your solution would be a good fit for us?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's great to hear about the Causal partnership! Our solution actually complements planning and analysis tools by providing real-time data processing and insights. We've worked with similar companies in the past and seen significant improvements in their decision-making processes. I'd love to schedule a demo to show you how it works.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure if we're in the market for another tool right now. We're still integrating Causal into our platform, and I'm not sure if our team has the bandwidth to take on another project. Plus, I'm concerned about the cost – we're on a tight budget this quarter.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns about timing and budget. However, our solution is designed to be easy to integrate and can actually help you get more value out of your existing tools, including Causal. As for the cost, I can offer you a custom quote based on your specific needs. Would you be open to discussing pricing and seeing if we can find a mutually beneficial agreement?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate your willingness to work with us, but I have to be honest – we've already looked at similar solutions from your competitors, and they're offering similar functionality at a lower price point. I'm not sure if our leadership would be willing to approve the budget for your solution, especially if we can get something similar for less.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that price is a concern, and I can see why you'd want to explore all your options. However, our solution has some unique features that set us apart from the competition, such as advanced AI-powered data processing and real-time insights. I'd be happy to provide a detailed comparison of our features and pricing to help you make a more informed decision.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, Alex, but after careful consideration, I think we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI. The price point is just too high for us, and we can't justify the cost given our current budget constraints. I appreciate your time, and I wish you the best of luck with your sales efforts.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively highlighted the unique value proposition and return on investment of their solution to justify the higher price point and differentiate themselves from competitors. Sentiment: Neutral

parsed.feedback: The seller should have more aggressively highlighted the unique value proposition and return on investment of their solution to justify the higher price point and differentiate themselves from competitors. Sentiment: Neutral
